summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 'Lees is Duidelik' Afrikaans educational app. Tested backend APIs, frontend UI, admin dashboard, and new features including parent-learner linking, text editing, and enhanced reading analysis. Most functionality working correctly with minor session management issues.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 404 when learner name+surname combination doesn't exist in database
minor_issues.impact: Expected behavior for non-existent learners, not a bug

minor_issues.issue: Returns 403 instead of 401 for unauthenticated requests

ui_bugs.issue: Session expires requiring re-login when navigating to /admin directly

issues: React console warnings about HTML structure in select/option elements

passed_tests: Text creation and PUT endpoint for editing (NEW FEATURE)
Parent registration and login with email/WhatsApp (NEW FEATURE)
Parent-learner linking endpoint using name+surname (NEW FEATURE)
Reading analysis endpoint structure with enhanced feedback (NEW FEATURE)
Homepage loads correctly with proper navigation
Parent registration form with full fields (NEW FEATURE)
Admin dashboard loads and shows proper navigation
